details.test: Task 1: Start registration for 9-year-old in Spring 2026 Minors with correct payment option
Task 2: Bookmark earliest home game for Tigers (Minors) and add to My Schedule
Task 3: Register for first Saturday batting clinic ages 11–12 costing $40 or less
Task 4: Volunteer for earliest 2-hour weekend afternoon concession shift at Field 2
Task 5: Follow Minors team with highest winning percentage and open its schedule
Task 6: View Rainout & Weather Policy then submit weather-related contact question
Task 7: Add cheapest youth hat under $25 to cart with standard shipping
Task 8: Choose nearest field with parking and restrooms within 10 miles of ZIP 12345 and add address to carpool planner
Task 9: Create 60-minute infield practice plan for ages 8–10 with three throwing drills
